Vendor.title: Vendor
Vendor.description: A vendor profile containing store information.

uid.description: The unique ID of the vendor.

slug.description: The unique URL slug for the store.

logo.description: The URL of the store logo.

location.description: The physical location of the store.

packageId.description: The ID of the purchased package.

createdAt.description: The date and time the vendor profile was created.

Product.title: Product
Product.description: A product listed by a vendor.

id.description: The unique ID of the product.

vendorId.description: The ID of the vendor who owns the product.

stock.description: The quantity of the product in stock.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the product image.

createdAt.description: The date and time the product was listed.

Order.title: Order
Order.description: An order placed by a customer.

id.description: The unique ID of the order.

vendorId.description: The ID of the vendor who receives the order.

items.description: The list of items in the order.

total.description: The total amount of the order.

fakeProbability.description: The probability score (0-1) that the order is fake.

createdAt.description: The date and time the order was placed.

Slug.title: Slug
Slug.description: A mapping from slug to vendor ID.

vendorId.description: The ID of the vendor associated with the slug.
